title: chrysobalanus icaco var. ellipticus
intro: Chrysobalanus icaco var. ellipticus, also known as the jucá or ice apple, is a tropical tree species native to the Americas. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Chrysobalanus icaco var. ellipticus include its ability to lower blood pressure, reduce fever, and treat digestive issues. The plant can be prepared as a herbal tea, infusion, or tincture, and has also been used in folk medicine to treat various ailments.
